lint.observation: 12 warnings, 0 errors (all non-blocking unused vars warnings)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document secure auth-token storage/retrieval pattern for the Electron main process. Currently workers fall back to process.env.SYNC_AUTH_TOKEN which is unlikely to work in packaged apps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F009 review: getAuthToken() in autoSyncTimer.ts uses process.env.SYNC_AUTH_TOKEN with no documented fallback pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add concrete retry default values for exponential backoff: baseDelayMs=1000, multiplier=2, maxDelayMs=300000, maxRetries=5.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F012 review: AGENTS.md mentions Implement retry with exponential backoff but does not specify values. Workers chose sensible defaults independently.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Expand backend-worker skill to cover sync-engine service work (auto-sync timers, network detection, pause/resume, retry mechanisms, IPC handlers). Currently the skill is focused only on Blok/COA schema changes, forcing workers to deviate for sync features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F009, F011, F012 reviews all note that SKILL.md does not mention timer, retry, or sync orchestration patterns. Transcripts show workers exploring code independently.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding a dedicated state/settings JSON column to the sync_config table instead of overloading remotePath with serialized JSON state objects.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F010, F011 reviews: autoSyncTimer.ts stores timer state in remotePath, diverging from the column documented URL/path semantics.
